scripts.deploy:sandbox: dotenv -e .env -- cdk deploy --all --app "npx tsx bin/ping.ts && npx tsx bin/provider.ts && npx tsx bin/runner.ts" --context environment=sandbox
scripts.deploy:production: cdk deploy --all --app "npx tsx bin/ping.ts && npx tsx bin/provider.ts && npx tsx bin/runner.ts" --context environment=production
scripts.deploy:provider:sandbox: dotenv -e .env -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/provider.ts" --context environment=sandbox --profile burner
scripts.deploy:runner:sandbox: dotenv -e .env -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/runner.ts" --context environment=sandbox --profile burner
scripts.deploy:ping:sandbox: dotenv -e .env -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/ping.ts" --context environment=sandbox --profile burner
